text.title: E2E Testing Antipatterns
text.summary: Common E2E failures: hard-coded waits, flaky selectors, test interdependence, over-mocking, and CI-specific gotchas.

antipattern.description: `page.waitForTimeout(5000)` or any hard-coded sleep instead of element/navigation waits.
antipattern.reason: Arbitrary sleeps are the primary source of flakiness — too short on slow CI, too long locally. Playwright auto-waits for actionability; use `expect(locator).toBeVisible()` instead.

antipattern.description: CSS selectors or dynamic IDs (`#submit-btn-1234`) as locators.
antipattern.reason: CSS selectors break on any style refactor; dynamic IDs change on every render. Only `data-testid` and ARIA-based locators (`getByRole`, `getByLabel`) are stable.

antipattern.description: Tests sharing a single user account across parallel workers.
antipattern.reason: Concurrent password changes, profile updates, or session mutations from parallel tests cause cascading failures. Use per-worker or per-test accounts.

antipattern.description: Visual snapshots committed from a macOS runner, diffed against a Linux CI runner.
antipattern.reason: Anti-aliasing and font rendering differ across OS. Visual snapshots must be captured and compared on the same OS. Force snapshot updates from one Linux runner only.

antipattern.description: `page.locator(...).click({ force: true })` to bypass actionability checks.
antipattern.reason: Force bypasses Playwright's visibility and interactability checks, hiding real UI bugs (overlapping elements, disabled states). It is always a symptom of a real problem to fix.

antipattern.description: E2E suite growing beyond 200 tests with no nightly/critical distinction.
antipattern.reason: Above 50 critical-path tests the suite exceeds 30 minutes; teams skip it. Enforce a budget; promote logic tests to unit/integration when possible.

antipattern.description: Trace ZIP files committed to git or stored in public CI artifacts without scrubbing.
antipattern.reason: Playwright traces capture network requests including auth tokens. Scrub via `playwright.config.ts` `recordHar` filters or add artifacts to `.gitignore`.
